creator: wombat@marsupial.org
text:
Just wanted to make you aware of bug 199022 https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=199022

The suggestion is to add CPE numbering scheme, which I think would be a nice addition, so it would make sense to incorporate those changes in the final version of the one maven port to rule them all since I think we all agree at this point it's the way to go.
